ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "recipe_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "steps" TEXT /* Detailed cooking instructions */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the recipe image */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the recipe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recipe was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recipe was last updated */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calorie count of the recipe */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine (e.g., Italian, Mexican) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "prep_time" TEXT /* Preparation time required */,
  "cook_time" TEXT /* Cooking time required */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time required (prep + cook) */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe yields */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video tutorial if available */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the original recipe source */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES recipe_origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe that uses the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the recipe */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient quantity */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is optional */,
  "is_alternative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is an alternative to another ingredient */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or tips for the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe image */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the recipe image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "is_thumbnail" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is a thumbnail */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., main, step-by-step, thumbnail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_images_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe origin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipe origin */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the origin */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "nutritional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional information entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe the nutritional information belongs to */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calorie count of the recipe */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein content of the recipe */,
  "carbs" REAL /* Carbohydrate content of the recipe */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat content of the recipe */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Fiber content of the recipe */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Sugar content of the recipe */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Sodium content of the recipe */,
  "saturated_fat" REAL /* Saturated fat content of the recipe */,
  "unsaturated_fat" REAL /* Unsaturated fat content of the recipe */,
  "cholesterol" REAL /* Cholesterol content of the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutritional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_info_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dietary_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dietary label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the dietary label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dietary label */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon for the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_dietary_labels" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dietary label */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the label is the primary label for the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id", "label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating and review */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the rating and review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review submitted by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating and review were submitted */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user recommends the recipe */,
  "difficulty_rating" REAL /* Rating for the difficulty of the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the meal plan */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe included in the meal plan */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the meal is planned for */,
  "meal_type" TEXT /* Type of meal (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the meal plan was created */,
  "meal_plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the meal plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the meal plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the meal plan */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the meal plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plans_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, premium subscriber) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "preferred_dietary_labels" TEXT /* Preferred dietary labels of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon for the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_tag_mapping" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id", "tag_id")
)
